topic: Choosing correct decimal operation for word problem
latex:
Zahra pumped $3.245$ gallons of gasoline into the first can. Then she pumped $2.124$ gallons into the second gas can. Which expression below represents how much more gasoline, in gallons, was in the first can than the second can?

\textbf{A.} $3.245 - 2.124$

\textbf{B.} $3.245 + 2.124$

\textbf{C.} $3.245 \div 2.124$

\textbf{D.} $3.245 \times 2.124$
